commands: docker rm -f aria2-proxy-e2e aria2-proxy-e2e-aria aria2-proxy-e2e-fs 2>/dev/null || true
docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 -f apps/vm/aria2-proxy/Dockerfile -t kbve/aria2-proxy:latest --load apps/vm/aria2-proxy/
docker run -d --name aria2-proxy-e2e --entrypoint sleep kbve/aria2-proxy:latest infinity

echo 'Waiting for container...' && for i in $(seq 1 30); do if docker exec aria2-proxy-e2e /bin/sh -c 'echo ok' >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Container ready after '"$i"'s'; break; fi; if [ $i -eq 30 ]; then echo 'Container did not become ready'; docker logs aria2-proxy-e2e 2>&1 | tail -20; docker rm -f aria2-proxy-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; sleep 1; done
cd apps/vm/aria2-proxy-e2e && npx vitest run; EC=$?; docker rm -f aria2-proxy-e2e aria2-proxy-e2e-aria aria2-proxy-e2e-fs 2>/dev/null || true; exit $EC
